title: LegenVD
description: Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Glad I don't have to do the math.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a +1/+1 counter deck, ft. Zimone, Paradox Sculptor as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:48 - Deck Tech
09:05 - vs Betor, Ancestor's Voice
16:20 - vs Rionya, Fire Dancer
21:05 - vs Sorin, Solemn Visitor
24:49 - vs Ureni of the Unwritten
29:10 - vs Lazlo, Enthusiastic Accuser
35:34 - vs Arwen, Mortal Queen
37:24 - vs Soul of Windgrace
40:41 - vs Kotis, Sibsig Champion
46:17 - vs Uharis, the Stormspinner
48:02 - vs Cloud, Ex-SOLDIER

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/zimone-paradox-sculptor-brawl
